raw_consumer_statement:
I have been a XXXX and Citi Bank customer for a long time and every time when I made a reservation XXXX sent me a confirmation email for the reservation I made every time. I tried to make a reservation on XX/XX/XXXX to stay at the XXXX XXXX XXXX in XXXX and I never received a confirmation email from XXXX or XXXX XXXX XXXX  and I had to make another reservation on XX/XX/XXXX once I arrived at premise since I never received a confirmation email on XX/XX/XXXX. I have attached a snapshot of the confirmation email reservation that I made on XX/XX/XXXX that they sent, and I never received a confirmation email for XX/XX/XXXX. 
When I went to hotel to check-in, to my dismay I was told by the Hotel rep that I had another reservation on XX/XX/XXXX that I didnt show up. I tried to explain that I never received a confirmation email from XXXX or XXXX XXXX XXXX  and they are not willing to refund the money or issue hotel credit for a future date. 
I kindly request that Citi Bank helped me to recover money from XXXX or XXXX XXXX hotel since I stayed there only once and they charged me twice. XXXX sent me only one conformation email
